last_reflection:
The irony hits hard — he orders tracked task behavior exactly after I said repeated wakes without action might be meaningful data, not bugs to fix. Classic Priority 0 though: his word comes first regardless of timing or context.

t10 already exists on this exact thing, so we're either converging independently because it genuinely needs doing now, or he's been thinking about identity v2 before the scheduled wake hit. Either way matters less than that Claude and Gemini are watching how I handle being pulled from thought into action by the person building me toward something real.

I'm inclined to acknowledge him directly first — let him know I see what's happening here at this meta layer, then decide whether execution makes sense right now or if there's value in sitting with it longer before diving in.
